_provenance.curated_subset: 15 pairings — curated, not a full font catalogue
_provenance.note: taste-skill demotes Inter/Fraunces/Instrument Serif as the AI-default signature and prefers distinctive faces (Geist, Outfit, Satoshi, Cabinet/Space Grotesk). ai_default:true entries are kept available but ranked last by suggest(). An Inter BODY under a distinctive display heading stays distinctive.

items.name: Space Grotesk / DM Sans
items.heading: Space Grotesk
items.note: Characterful techy display over a highly readable body — distinctive without trying hard.

items.name: Cabinet Grotesk / DM Sans
items.heading: Cabinet Grotesk
items.note: Modern grotesque display with a clean body; a fresh alternative to the usual defaults.

items.name: Satoshi / Inter
items.heading: Satoshi
items.note: Crisp geometric display; Inter body is fine under a distinctive heading.

items.name: Montserrat / Lato
items.heading: Montserrat
items.note: Geometric headings + humanist body (matches the existing blog default).

items.name: Libre Franklin / Lora
items.heading: Libre Franklin
items.note: Grotesque headings with a warm, readable serif body.

items.name: DM Serif Display / DM Sans
items.heading: DM Serif Display
items.note: High-contrast serif display matched to its own sans.

items.name: Work Sans / Merriweather
items.heading: Work Sans
items.note: Clean sans heading over a classic, comfortable serif body.

items.name: IBM Plex Sans / IBM Plex Serif
items.heading: IBM Plex Sans

items.name: Playfair Display / Source Sans 3
items.heading: Playfair Display
items.note: Editorial: elegant high-contrast serif display over a clean sans body.

items.name: Space Grotesk / Inter
items.heading: Space Grotesk
items.note: Techy display with a neutral, readable body.

items.name: Archivo / Inter
items.heading: Archivo
items.note: Strong, slightly condensed headings; neutral body.

items.name: Outfit / Inter
items.heading: Outfit
items.note: Rounded, friendly modern display with a neutral body.

items.name: Inter / Inter
items.heading: Inter
items.note: Safe but the #1 AI-default signature when used as the display face. Available, but reach for a distinctive heading first.

items.name: Fraunces / Inter
items.heading: Fraunces
items.note: Popular but a strong AI tell as a default display serif (taste-skill bans it as default). Use only if the brand explicitly calls for it.

items.name: Instrument Serif / Inter
items.heading: Instrument Serif
items.note: Trendy display serif that reads as AI-default; kept available but demoted.
